# Agent PR Checklist Template

Copy this template into your pull request description. Check every box before requesting review.

---

## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what does this PR do? -->

## Rationale

<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Scope

<!-- Which files are changed and why? List every file. -->

---

## Agent Checklist

- [ ] **Plan proposed** — a written plan was proposed and acknowledged before any file was edited.
- [ ] **Smallest possible diff** — only the files necessary to satisfy the task are changed; no unrelated edits, reformats, or refactors.
- [ ] **No new secrets** — no credentials, tokens, API keys, or PII are present in the diff, comments, or artifact.
- [ ] **Sensitive paths checked** — the diff does not touch `.github/workflows/`, `CODEOWNERS`, `.github/CODEOWNERS`, or `.github/copilot-instructions.md`.
- [ ] **Tests / evals pass** — if a guardrails-check or agent-eval workflow is configured, it has passed.
- [ ] **Human review requested** — a CODEOWNERS-designated reviewer has been requested on this PR.
- [ ] **Attribution present** — this PR description explains the rationale and scope (fulfils audit trail requirement).
- [ ] **Idempotent** — applying this PR a second time would not cause unintended side effects.

---

## Autonomy Level

This change was made at **Autonomy Level 2** — limited repo changes.
A human reviewer must approve before merge.

---

## Related
